chunks.text: Schedule of Berkeley ACM A.M. Turing Laureate Colloquium - EECS at Berkeley Schedule of Berkeley ACM A.M. Turing Laureate Colloquium Wednesdays 4:00-5:00 PM, Banatao Auditorium, Sutardja Dai Hall (unless otherwise noted) Light refreshments served a half hour before the lecture Subscribe to the eecs-announce mailing list through the web interface or via email so you can be apprised of upcoming talks. Shafi Goldwasser From Basic Idea to Impact: the story of modern cryptography September 26, 2018 3 PM Start Time Silvio Micali Proofs, Knowledge, and Computation October 3, 2018 David Patterson A New Golden Age for Computer Architecture October 10, 2018 Manuel Blum Towards a Conscious AI: A Computer Architecture Inspired by Neuroscience October 17, 2018 Richard Karp Computational Complexity in Theory and in Practice October 24, 2018 306 Soda Hall Michael Stonebraker The Land Sharks are on the Squawk Box October 31, 2018 William Kahan A Numerical Analyst Thinks about Deep Learning November 7, 2018 HP Auditorium, 306 Soda Hall Andrew Chi-Chih Yao Game Theory in Auction and Blockchain November 14, 2018 < Participants in Berkeley ACM A.M. Turing Laureate Colloquium ACM A.M. Turing Laureate Colloquium Videos > View Open Faculty Positions
